description_long: This object is a lifelike representation of a medium-sized bird with a robust, rounded body and a long, straight tail. The plumage is predominantly grayish-brown with subtle gradients and mottling, and the wings are tucked closely to the body. The head is slightly domed, with a short, conical beak that is well-suited for seed eating. The legs are short and not prominently visible, but appear to be a muted pinkish or gray color. The tail is straight and extends well beyond the body, with a squared-off tip and a slight central notch.
description: A medium-sized, grayish-brown bird with a rounded body, long straight tail, and short conical beak. The plumage is mottled and the tail is squared and extends beyond the body.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bird's rounded body, long straight tail, and subtle mottling on the wings and back.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the squared tail tip and the symmetrical arrangement of tail feathers.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the bird's body profile, tail length, and the short, conical beak.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the domed head, beak shape, and the central alignment of the tail.
attribute_plumage_pattern: mottled gray and brown with subtle gradients and faint barring on wings
